text: There are a few people I know who went to Thailand, and they said they really liked Thailand. My dream is to open a Korean language academy in Thailand. Oh, really? Yes. Why? My older sister and sister-in-law were going to live in Thailand for a month with my older brother-in-law. My older brother-in-law was so busy that I was the only one left, so I lived in Thailand for a month for free. I lived in Chiang Mai for a month, and the neighborhood was so pretty and the people were so kind.
